description_long: This office building is a small, box-shaped structure situated on a large, flat paved lot. The building features a simple, modernist design with a flat roof and minimal ornamentation. Its exterior appears to be clad in a combination of light gray and darker gray materials, possibly concrete or stone, with a few small, regularly spaced windows. The entrance is located on one side, marked by a slightly recessed area and a single door. The building is surrounded by a wide expanse of pavement, suggesting it may be set in a business park or similar urban environment. There is no visible signage or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function.
description: A small, boxy office building with a flat roof and minimalistic modern design, set on a large paved lot. The exterior is gray with a few small windows and a single recessed entrance.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance and a small window, with the building centered on a large paved area.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the building's rectangular shape and the absence of windows or doors on this facade.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a plain, windowless wall, emphasizing the building's simple, boxy form.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows a small window and the continuation of the flat, unadorned exterior.
attribute_window_pattern: Sparse, small rectangular windows with regular spacing on select facades.
